hero.title: Premium Egyptian
hero.subtitle: At Alraheeq Herbs, we deliver the richness of Egyptian agriculture to customers around the world through trusted sourcing, careful processing, and export-focused quality standards.

intro.title: From Egyptian Origin to
intro.text1: We are committed to supplying natural Egyptian products that meet the expectations of importers, manufacturers, and global buyers seeking quality, reliability, and professional export service.
intro.text2: Trusted partnerships with the finest Egyptian farmers and suppliers to ensure the highest quality standards in every shipment.

process.title: From Source
process.step1Text: We work with trusted growers and suppliers to source high-quality herbs, spices, seeds, and dehydrated vegetables that meet export requirements.
process.step2Text: Each batch is reviewed and handled with attention to cleanliness, consistency, and compliance with customer specifications.
process.step3Text: We prepare shipments with professional coordination, reliable documentation, and efficient logistics to support smooth international delivery.

why.title: Why
why.r1Text: We focus on supplying products with consistent standards and dependable export readiness.
why.r2Text: Our strong sourcing relationships help us secure premium raw materials and maintain stable supply.
why.r3Text: We understand international business requirements and aim to deliver a smooth and reliable export experience.
why.r4Text: We believe strong business relationships are built on trust, transparency, and consistent performance.

categories.title: Our Main
categories.herbsDesc: Premium Egyptian herbs with export-grade natural quality
categories.seedsDesc: Carefully selected seeds meeting market requirements
categories.spicesDesc: Egyptian spices with exceptional color, aroma and quality
categories.dehydratedDesc: Dried vegetables for industry and international trade

cta.title: Looking for a Reliable
cta.text: Let Alraheeq Herbs support your business with premium natural products and dependable export service.

intro.text1: Alraheeq Herbs is an Egyptian company specialized in exporting herbs, spices, seeds, and dehydrated vegetables to international markets.
intro.text2: We are dedicated to offering natural products of dependable quality while building strong partnerships with clients who value consistency, service, and professionalism.
intro.text3: We believe that successful export begins with the right source. That is why we pay close attention to product selection, handling, and preparation at every stage of the supply process.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To become a trusted name in the global herbs and spices industry by delivering quality Egyptian products with professionalism, consistency, and care.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To connect the value of Egyptian agriculture with international markets through reliable sourcing, careful quality control, and customer-focused export solutions.

hero.title: Premium Egyptian Products
hero.subtitle: At Alraheeq Herbs, we offer a carefully selected portfolio of Egyptian natural products prepared to meet diverse market needs and customer requirements.

cta.title: For product lists, specifications, and quotations
cta.subtitle: please contact our team directly.

herbs.title: Herbs & Infusions
herbs.desc: Wide range of Egyptian herbs known for their natural aroma, purity, and export quality.

seeds.title: Seeds
seeds.desc: Seeds sourced with attention to quality, cleanliness, and customer specifications.

spices.title: Spices
spices.desc: Premium Egyptian spices with careful attention to color, aroma, appearance, and export suitability.

dehydrated.title: Dehydrated Vegetables
dehydrated.desc: Selected and prepared to meet the needs of food processors, traders, and global buyers.

hero.title: Quality at
hero.subtitle: At Alraheeq Herbs, quality is not limited to the final product. It is part of every stage, from sourcing and selection to preparation and export handling.

quality.intro: We are committed to supplying products that meet customer expectations and support international market standards. We understand that consistency matters.

safety.title: A Strong Commitment to Food Safety
safety.text: Food safety is an essential part of our export process. We work with careful control and professional handling to support safe, compliant, and market-ready products across our supply chain.

control.title: Careful Review and Product Evaluation
control.text: Our quality control approach is based on checking each batch against agreed requirements and export expectations. We aim to deliver products with dependable consistency and professional presentation.

sampling.title: Attention to Detail from Batch to Batch
sampling.text: We believe that accurate inspection and product review are essential for maintaining consistency and customer confidence. Each order is handled with care and attention to required standards.

certificates.commitment: Our goal is to provide confidence to our clients by ensuring that every shipment is prepared with care, clarity, and export readiness.
certificates.productSafetyDesc: Full compliance with international food safety standards
certificates.exportDocsDesc: Complete preparation and accurate organization of export documents
certificates.intlStandardsDesc: Compliance with international market requirements at every stage
certificates.guaranteedQualityDesc: Consistent quality standards in every shipment
certificates.docsSubtitle: We prepare all required documents for export operations

faq.a1: We export Egyptian herbs, spices, seeds, and dehydrated vegetables prepared for international markets.
faq.q2: How do you maintain product quality?
faq.a2: We follow a careful process that includes sourcing, handling, product review, and export preparation to support consistency and quality.
faq.q3: Can you supply based on customer specifications?
faq.a3: Yes, we work to align our products with customer requirements whenever possible.
faq.q4: Do you support export documents and shipment coordination?
faq.a4: Yes, we prepare and coordinate export requirements according to the order and destination needs.
faq.a5: Lead time depends on the product, quantity, and destination. We always aim for efficient preparation and timely delivery.
faq.a6: Minimum quantities vary by product type. Please contact our team for detailed information based on your specific needs.
faq.stillQuestionsSubtitle: Our team is ready to answer all your inquiries

hero.title: Let's Build
hero.subtitle: We are ready to support your sourcing needs with premium Egyptian herbs, spices, seeds, and dehydrated vegetables.
